layout.page_container: max-w-screen-2xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-8

sections.header: text-center py-6 border-b-4 border-t-8 border-[#111111] mb-8
sections.left_sidebar: col-span-12 md:col-span-3 lg:col-span-2 flex flex-col gap-8 pr-6 md:border-r border-[#111111]/30
sections.main_content: col-span-12 md:col-span-5 lg:col-span-7 flex flex-col gap-8
sections.right_sidebar: col-span-12 md:col-span-4 lg:col-span-3 pl-6 md:border-l border-[#111111]/30 flex flex-col gap-6
sections.bottom_section: col-span-12 grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6 pt-8 border-t-2 border-[#111111]/50 mt-8

navigation_sidebar.item: py-2 border-b border-[#111111]/20 font-serif text-lg hover:italic cursor-pointer transition-all

featured_article.style: flex flex-col gap-4 pb-8 border-b border-[#111111]/30
featured_article.image: w-full aspect-video object-cover grayscale contrast-125 sepia-[.2]
featured_article.headline: font-serif text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black leading-tight

sidebar_article.style: flex gap-4 items-start pb-4 border-b border-[#111111]/20
sidebar_article.image: w-20 h-20 object-cover grayscale contrast-125 shrink-0
sidebar_article.title: font-serif text-lg font-bold leading-snug

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a classic, newspaper-style dashboard with a strict off-white/black palette (Archetype 4 Vintage variant).
Use 'Playfair Display' for headlines and 'Merriweather' for body. Import these from Google Fonts in your CSS/HTML.
Implement a 12-column grid layout on desktop: Left sidebar (2 cols), Main content (7 cols), Right sidebar (3 cols).
The header must be massive, centered 'NEWS LEDGER' text, bounded by thick top and bottom border lines to mimic a newspaper masthead.
Left Sidebar must include Category Navigation (U.S., World, Local, Business, Technology, Entertainment, Sports, Science, Health) and a Spotlight section.
Right Sidebar must be a list of Featured Articles with small square thumbnails.
The Bottom Section should be a 4-column grid of article cards stretching full width below the main 3-column area.
Every section and column should be visibly separated using dark borders (1px solid #111111 or similar) to recreate the newspaper grid look. Use divide-x, divide-y, or explicit border-r/border-b.
Apply 'grayscale contrast-125 sepia-[.2]' to all images in Tailwind to give them a vintage newsprint look.
No modern UI components like rounded corners, heavy drop shadows, or gradient backgrounds. Use sharp corners and solid black lines.
